chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2144 of 2021 Power Cement Ltd. Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection No.18. 2. for orders on Misc. No.9215/21 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 08.08.2024 Mr. Asif Ali Khawaja for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he has been instructed by the petitioner not to press this petition. The petition as such is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Chief Justice Judge
